about.title: About Us
about.story_title: Born from a Passion for Hookah
about.story_text_1: Tactical HB began with a simple desire — to elevate the hookah smoking experience to a new level. Our founder, a passionate shisha enthusiast, realised that the accessories available on the market often lacked the quality and uniqueness he was looking for.
about.story_text_2: Drawing inspiration from the striking materials and colours of weaponry, he set out to design, manufacture, and rigorously test products that not only looked special but delivered an unmatched smoking experience.
about.story_text_3: We take immense pride in being a Ukrainian brand. Our products reflect the craftsmanship and dedication that our country is known for.
about.value_1_text: Every product is made in Ukraine from the highest quality materials.
about.value_2_text: Weaponry-inspired aesthetics — unique in the hookah industry worldwide.
about.value_3_text: Aviation aluminium, specialist surface treatment, zero defect rate.
about.value_4_text: Wholesale clients across Europe, USA, and the Middle East.
about.payment_text_1: We accept card payments through Plata by Mono, along with Apple Pay, Google Pay and PayPal. Every transaction is handled by a certified payment gateway — your card details travel encrypted and are never stored on our servers.
about.payment_text_2: Checkout takes a few taps and needs no account. You'll receive confirmation by email the moment your payment succeeds, and we begin preparing your order the same working day.
about.payment_note: Prices are shown in hryvnia (₴) for orders within Ukraine and in euro (€) elsewhere.
about.delivery_text_1: We ship with Nova Poshta and Ukrposhta — to a branch, a parcel locker, or by courier to your door. Orders are handed to the carrier within 1–2 business days of payment confirmation.
about.delivery_text_2: Delivery is charged at the carrier's own rates and paid by the recipient on collection, unless a promotion states otherwise. A tracking number is emailed to you as soon as the parcel is dispatched.
about.returns_title: Thirty days to change your mind
about.returns_intro: If something isn't right, we'll make it right. Any order can be returned within 30 days — no excluded categories, no awkward questions.
about.return_1_text: Return any order within 30 days of the date you received it.
about.return_2_text: The item should be unused and returned complete, in the packaging it arrived in.
about.return_3_text: We keep no list of non-returnable products — everything we sell can be returned.
about.return_4_text: The cost of sending the item back to us is covered by the customer.
about.return_5_text: Email admin@tactical-hb.com with your order number and we'll send return instructions the same day.
about.returns_refund: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 14 days of us receiving and inspecting the returned item.
